title: Board model — column layout and keyboard navigation
definition_of_done: BubbleTea model with open/active/done columns; h/l or arrow key nav between columns; j/k nav within column; enter opens detail viewport; unit tests pass

acceptance.description: BubbleTea model with three columns, navigation, and detail viewport; unit tests pass

outcome: BubbleTea board model implemented: 3 columns (open/active/done), h/l column nav, j/k item nav, enter opens detail viewport; 20 tests, 95% coverage, make check green

notes.msg: Starting implementation: board model with column layout and keyboard nav
